Class SymbolicEquivalenceClass

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.AbstractElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.impl.SymbolicEquivalenceClass
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISymbolicElement, ISymbolicEquivalenceClass
public class SymbolicEquivalenceClass extends AbstractElement implements ISymbolicEquivalenceClass
Default implementation of ISymbolicEquivalenceClass.

      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      services - The Services to use.
      terms - The contained JTerms which represents the same ISymbolicObject.
      settings - The IModelSettings to use.
